query:
-- Check the join session
SELECT id, email, step, userId, membershipTier, membershipType, signerName, createdAt
FROM join_sessions
WHERE email = 'astmeridian@outlook.com'
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;

-- Check team_invites where Abu Sufyan (user 9486760) is the leader
SELECT id, teamId, leaderId, invitedEmail, token, status, expiresAt, acceptedAt, acceptedByUserId, createdAt
FROM team_invites
WHERE leaderId = 9486760 OR acceptedByUserId = 9486760
ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Check Abu Sufyan's CRM profile for teamId
SELECT id, userId, personalEmail, membershipTier, teamId, agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles
WHERE userId = 9486760;

-- Check all agent_teams
SELECT id, name, createdAt FROM agent_teams ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
